name: Gound Gyee's Ywar Thar Village
overview:
Gound Gyee, the village youth leader, is full of altruism and enthusiastically helps with all matters benefiting the village.

Will his intentions succeed in winning over his beloved Shwe Hmue Lay, amidst the disapproval and problems from his future father-in-law?

"Gound Gyee" is a series where you can enjoy the humorous mishaps of the villagers' football frenzy after the sport is introduced in Ywar Thar village. This village, though far from the city, is progressive in every aspect except for sports.

trailers.title: ဂေါင်းကြီးတို့ ရွာသာရွာ - Official Trailer
